actions.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes three attacks, using [[/item .6qvUZeTimud7ekV8]] or [[/item .9p8yotv4r7nt3NWl]] in any combination.
actions.name: Multiattack

actions.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: Detect Magic, Detect Thoughts, Dispel Magic, Fireball (level 5 version), Invisibility, Lightning Bolt (level 5 version), Mage Hand, Prestidigitation

2/Day Each: Animate Dead, Dimension Door, Plane Shift

1/Day Each: Chain Lightning, Finger of Death, Power Word Kill, Scrying
actions.name: Spellcasting

actions.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts Counterspell or Shield in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.
actions.name: Protective Magic

actions.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]], and the target has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition until the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s next turn.
actions.name: Paralyzing Touch

range.special: to an unoccupied space it can see

legendary_actions.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} teleports up to [[lookup @range.value activity=zvj61Na7MlcIN2xw]] [[lookup @range.units activity=zvj61Na7MlcIN2xw]]. [[lookup @range.special activity=zvj61Na7MlcIN2xw]], and each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=zvj61Na7MlcIN2xw]] within [[lookup @target.template.size activity=zvj61Na7MlcIN2xw]] [[lookup @target.template.units activity=zvj61Na7MlcIN2xw]]. of the space it left takes [[/damage average]] damage.
legendary_actions.name: Deathly Teleport

legendary_actions.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=qSz7l1czwIc5j9gP]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=qSz7l1czwIc5j9gP]] that isn't an Undead in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=qSz7l1czwIc5j9gP]]-foot Emanation originating from the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Success: Half damage.

Failure or Success: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.
legendary_actions.name: Disrupt Life

legendary_actions.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts Fear, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.
legendary_actions.name: Frightening Gaze

special_abilities.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.
special_abilities.name: Legendary Resistance

special_abilities.description: If destroyed, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} reforms in [[/r 1d10]] days if it has a spirit jar, reviving with all its Hit Points. The new body appears in an unoccupied space within the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s lair.
special_abilities.name: Spirit Jar
